title: Double Damage
body:
# ⚔️ Double Damage

**Double Damage** is a simple Minecraft datapack Doubles all damages.

![Main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qVrr0mXE/images/2484911db5a4731e5b1112fcdb606404542ebc3e.gif)

**Note: _Sometimes the death message may not appear. Also You receive knockback twice._**

## ✨ Features

- Works with all types of mob damages,player damages, fall damages.

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.
2. Place it in your world's `datapacks` folder.
3. Use `/reload` after joining the world.
4. You're all set! Move around and see your coordinates at the bottom of your screen.

## 🧱 Compatibility

- Minecraft Java Edition 1.19.4+
- No external resource packs needed

## 🌐 ITITAN Hosting
